name: Citrus Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons chopped fresh parsley or 2 teaspoons dried parsley
1 teaspoon chopped fresh oregano or 1/4 teaspoon dried oregano
1 tablespoon frozen orange juice concentrate, thawed
1 tablespoon white wine vinegar or cider vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small jar with a tight-fitting lid, combine all ingredients.
2. Shake the jar to blend everything well.
This recipe yields approximately 2/3 cup (8 calories per serving), with no fat and 0 cholesterol, containing 50 milligrams of sodium.
